items.text: Hyper-V migration — connect to Hyper-V hosts, browse VMs, and migrate to Proxmox via virt-v2v
Nutanix AHV migration — connect to Prism Central, download disks, and migrate to Proxmox via virt-v2v
vCenter migration — migrate VMs from VMware vCenter (in addition to direct ESXi)
Migration Dashboard — unified view with KPIs, recent jobs, and hypervisor logos
SSHFS Boot migration mode — near-zero downtime VM migration from ESXi
Dashboard overhaul — dark vignette widgets, new widget types, global time range picker
Multi-dashboard support — create multiple dashboards with tabs and drag-drop reorder
Auto-HA — automatically configure High Availability for VMs on clusters
Live VM screenshot preview — see a live console preview for QEMU VMs
Datacenter Settings tab — configure PVE tag styles, general options, and more
LXC template listing — browse available CT templates in the creation wizard
Markdown notes — render Markdown in VM, node, and cluster descriptions
Hardware System section — BIOS, Machine Type, Display, SCSI Controller management
Configurable energy currency for Green IT cost display
Rolling update reboot prediction and skip indicator in wizard
Tags now display with PVE colors, shapes (full/dense/circle), and responsive overflow in all tables
DRS recommendations grouped by cluster with balance graph in drawer
Expandable charts everywhere — CPU, RAM, Ceph, Storage, with proper axes
VM summary panel — vCPU count, disk list, storage usage bar via guest agent
HA inline selector, console OS overlay, and chart color improvements
Cluster view — HA & Ceph UI improvements, node trends, affinity rules
Backup job dialog redesigned with HA resource management
Taskbar always dark in light mode with Proxmox node icons
LXC containers — swap editing and disk display
Migration pipeline — virtio-scsi driver, NTFS dirty flag recovery, guest tools firstboot injection
Top Consumers widget now persists CPU/Memory tab selection across page refreshes
DRS notification bell now matches the Recommendations tab (validates stale entries)
VM migration dialog now correctly detects local vs shared storage from PVE API
Tag colors consistent with Proxmox datacenter.cfg color-map across all views
Security: updated vite 8.0.2 to 8.0.5 (3 CVEs patched)
Real-time network traffic visualization powered by sFlow and Open vSwitch
Sankey flow diagram — interactive Source → Application → Destination visualization with animated flows
Time series bandwidth charts per VM with InfluxDB storage
Top Talkers, Top Pairs, and Top Ports overview with click-through details
sFlow agent management — configure OVS sFlow directly from the UI
Configurable sampling rate with recommendations based on network speed
InfluxDB integration for historical time series data
Full German (Deutsch) translation — available in the language selector
Multi-tenant support — isolate and manage multiple environments from a single ProxCenter instance
Tenant management panel in Settings (super admin only)
Per-tenant data isolation — connections, VMs, and configurations scoped to each tenant
Seamless tenant switching from the dashboard
Bulk migration — migrate multiple VMs at once from ESXi or XCP-ng to Proxmox
Live migration support — migrate running VMs with minimal downtime
ESXi migration pipeline with disk download, conversion (qemu-img) and import
XCP-ng migration pipeline with XVA export and automated conversion
Real-time progress tracking per VM during bulk migrations
